description: Official letter, six fragmentary lines in Arabic, recycled by ʿEli b. Yeḥezqel ha-Kohen of Jerusalem (d. ca. 1055) for a Piyyuṭ which dates the state document around that time. Needs examination. See also PGPID 23556 and PGPID 34769. Mentions a place with the adjective "al-Maḥrūs" and the partial name of an amīr, "al-mulk", l4 also mentions the caliph [Amīr] al-Muʾminīn. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
